center.name: 馬卡瑙半島市
center.summary: 馬卡瑙半島市是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黃肩亞馬遜鸚鵡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: On the Venezuelan island of Margarita, it is extirpated from the east side, which is heavily commercialized and a popular tourist destination, existing only on the Macanao Peninsula. Also native to Aruba, it went locally extinct by 1947
